screenshot_note: Puppeteer failed again -- Docker worker hit pthread_create resource exhaustion (same as review #101). Code-only analysis this cycle.

suggestions.title: Mobile pinned hover card has no visible dismiss control -- STRIKE 10 🚨
suggestions.description: CRITICAL: 10 consecutive reviews unfixed. On touch devices, Character.jsx shows a pinned hover card (pinnedCard state) when tapped. The only dismiss is clicking outside .char -- not discoverable, no X button, not announced. Add a close button inside the card visible only at (hover: none) media query. tabIndex=0, aria-label='Close card'. This is a 5-minute fix.

suggestions.title: App.jsx 1590 lines, Office.jsx 1871 lines -- monolith unchanged -- STRIKE 10 🚨
suggestions.description: CRITICAL: 10 consecutive reviews unfixed. Both files byte-identical to review 100. Office.jsx contains 15+ constant maps and 10+ embedded components. App.jsx has StatsBar, ShortcutToast, WorkerCard, ActivityLog, VibeSparkline, EmptyState and LoadingSkeleton all inline. This is a large refactor but it's blocking code maintainability.

suggestions.title: lastHuddle ref prop passes stale data to ConferenceTable -- STRIKE 10 🚨
suggestions.description: CRITICAL: 10 consecutive reviews unfixed. Office.jsx passes lastHuddle (a React ref) to ConferenceTable. When meeting ends, useEffect mutates lastHuddle.current.endedAt AFTER the render. ConferenceTable reads endedAt as null. Fix: lift into useState or pass as plain value prop. 10-minute fix.

suggestions.title: Speech bubble escapes office floor container on mobile -- STRIKE 9
suggestions.description: Manager speech bubble max-width: 160px, positioned absolutely. On 375px screens near edges it clips. Add @media (max-width: 480px) containment CSS.

suggestions.title: Milestone confetti fires for every user on every session load
suggestions.description: review_number >= 100 is permanently true. milestoneConfettiFiredRef only prevents within-session. Every page load = confetti. Fix: localStorage gate. Two lines.

suggestions.title: completionToast renders 14 inline style properties
suggestions.description: Extract to .completion-toast CSS class. Keep only dynamic --toast-color as CSS custom property.

suggestions.title: IIFE patterns inside JSX render -- 4 instances
suggestions.description: Extract IIFEs to local consts above return statement.

suggestions.title: Thought bubble double RAF handles not cancelled on unmount -- STRIKE 5
suggestions.description: Store RAF IDs and cancel in cleanup, or use setTimeout(fn, 32).

suggestions.title: vibeCaption aria-live region conditionally rendered -- STRIKE 5
suggestions.description: Always render the div, use empty string when no caption. Screen readers miss mount-with-content.

suggestions.title: Footer quote button missing aria-label -- STRIKE 8
Character tooltips via CSS ::after -- not in accessibility tree -- STRIKE 8
suggestions.description: Use aria-describedby pointing to real DOM element instead of data-tooltip pseudo-elements.

suggestions.title: polling-paused-pill button missing aria-label -- STRIKE 3
suggestions.description: Add aria-label='Auto-refresh paused -- click to resume'.

suggestions.title: bloberto-thought-bubble aria-hidden hides reactive content -- STRIKE 3
footer-tagline key prop forces DOM remount -- STRIKE 7
suggestions.description: Use CSS class toggling instead of key-based remount. Destroys focus state.

suggestions.title: ideas.json fetched on every load forever -- STRIKE 3
suggestions.description: Gate with localStorage after first confetti. Eliminates unnecessary network request.

suggestions.title: Office window flat rectangle in dark mode -- STRIKE 6
Stats bar wraps at 768-900px -- STRIKE 8
suggestions.description: Add overflow-x: auto; flex-wrap: nowrap below 900px.

suggestions.title: lone-survivor-label inline styles -- use existing CSS class -- STRIKE 5
suggestions.description: Move 7 inline style properties to the existing .lone-survivor-label in Office.css.

suggestions.title: Character cursor:pointer via inline style spread -- use CSS class

praise: All review-99 and review-100 stability fixes still holding -- no regressions detected.
The vibe streak system, PANIC SVGs, screensaver-per-worker, and ghost OOO bubbles remain delightful.
Worker filter bar in Activity Log still has correct ARIA roles and keyboard navigation.
safeSave/safeRead wrappers and Promise.allSettled patterns remain solid.
Office.css is genuinely impressive -- 1300+ lines of well-organized, creative CSS with excellent reduced-motion support.
milestone_note: Review #102 -- Three items hit STRIKE 10 and are now CRITICAL. Zero source code changes since review #101. The codebase is stable but stagnating on known issues. The mobile hover card dismiss (5 min fix), lastHuddle stale ref (10 min fix), and perpetual confetti (2 min fix) collectively represent maybe 20 minutes of work and would fix the three most impactful bugs. The monolith extraction is the big one -- 3461 lines across two files is genuinely hard to maintain. Fun factor remains a perfect 5. Everything else is stuck waiting for someone to actually do the fixes.
